bio: Quinn joined us at the very end of 2023. He didn't move too far from feeding station 1 and made friends with a couple of the other cats in the area. Unfortantely he had some severe health issues in August 2025 and ultimately had to have one of his legs amputated. Obviously he couldn't go back outside, so he has been with different fosters since then. He is a lovable boy and being a tri-cat doesn't stop him running around. He also loves playing and looking at himself in mirrors!
location: Previously in Cluster Q downstairs from Al Maya Supermarket
